calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Nov-14-2019 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Mitch Fenton, Esq. for Plaintiff/Respondent Kevin DiPasquale is present (plaintiff is not present - no substitution on file).
Daniel Bornstein, Esq. for Defendant/Appellant is present.
David Busse Defendant/Appellant is present.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn.

The Court makes inquiries regarding procedural questions and defendants respond regarding substitution of counsel, or lack thereof.

The Court recieves a trial brief, marked as Respondent's Exhibit A, from counsel Mitch Fenton.

The Court hears the argument of counsels regarding presence of parties and lack of subpoena.

Mitch Fenton, Esq testifies on behalf of the plaintiff - There is no substition on file. The Court allows counsel to proceed with the case despite the absence of the plaintiffs.

Daniel Bornstein, Esq. testifies on behalf of the defendant/appellant David Busse and moves for a motion for non-suit. The Court hears further argument regarding authentication of evidence. The following documentary evidence is introduced.

Appellant's Exhibit 1 - 5/2/19 Email from Busse, 1 page
Appellant's Exhibit 2 - Budget Blinds Invoice, 1 page

Mitch Fenton, Esq further testifies on behalf of the plaintiff and cross examines the defendant/appellant David Busse.

The Court hears further from both sides.

The Court denies the Plaintiff/Respondent's request for continuance.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.

JPT Jason Jungries, Clerk: A. Pascual, not reported. (525)

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Sep-13-2019 Judgment Entered
